title: Down but Not Out: Buy These Beaten-Down Dividend Stocks Before They Skyrocket
text: When stocks go down but the underlying businesses remain healthy, dividend-focused investors can get paid a handsome sum to wait for a recovery.

title: Bill Ackman Cuts Domino's Pizza Out of Portfolio
text: A little over a year after establishing a stake in Domino's Pizza Inc. ( DPZ , Financial), Pershing Square leader Bill Ackman (Trades, Portfolio) disclosed earlier this week his firm completely sold out of the stock.

title: Bill Ackman Takes a Slice Out of Domino's Pizza
text: Bill Ackman (Trades, Portfolio) is a legendary activist investor who is the founder and investment manager of Pershing Square Capital Management. As of the investment firm's second-quarter 2022 13F report, it had $7.46 billion in U.S. common stock holdings.

title: Bill Ackman Just Sold Off Domino's Pizza (DPZ) Stock. Here's Why.
text: Shares of Domino's Pizza (NYSE: DPZ ) are in the spotlight after Bill Ackman's Pershing Square reported selling its entire 2.09 million share stake. The billionaire investor first purchased DPZ stock during Q2 of 2021, amassing a nearly 6% stake.

title: Billionaire investor Bill Ackman has sold all of his Domino's Pizza stock, after building the 5% stake only last year
text: Ackman's Pershing Square has exited its Domino's Pizza bet, citing the fast-food chain's lofty valuation and the volatile market backdrop.

title: A Trio of Companies Growing Earnings Fast
text: The S&P 500 saw the annual real earnings per share of its member companies increase by an average growth rate of 19.6% every year over the past five years ending in December 2021. The index, which stood at 4,228.48 as of Friday, has climbed more than 70% over the past five years.

title: Domino's (DPZ) Rallies 22% in 3 Months: Will the Upside Last?
text: Domino's (DPZ) is benefiting from robust digitalization, expansion efforts and sales-building initiatives.

title: 2 Stocks to Buy Before They Take Off
text: These stocks could soar in the next bull market.

title: Domino's tried to sell pizza to Italians. It failed
text: Domino's' Italian job was harder than it looked.

title: After 7 years, the last Domino's in Italy has reportedly closed. US company's delivery push fell flat in the land where pizza was born.
text: At one point, Alessandro Lazzaroni, who headed up Domino's in Italy, said he hoped to have 880 Domino's locations in the country by 2030.

title: Domino's loses Italian appetite amid stiff competition from traditional pizzerias
text: Domino's Pizza has closed its last 29 stores in Italy amid stiff competition from traditional pizzerias that started offering delivery services during the pandemic. It arrived in the home of pizza in 2015, when it had over 12,000 stores globally, with the aspiration of gaining a 2% market share.

title: Domino's Pizza exits Italy as American pies fall flat
text: The Michigan-based chain originally planned to open 880 stores in the country.

title: Ackman's Pershing Square Is Trading at a 30% Discount
text: Like most markets, the London Stock Exchange has a wide range of funds to choose from. Investors with the ability to invest here can find two large funds as constituents of the FTSE 100.
